postconditions: result == match facts.decision { NonceDecision::Accept => facts.pending_slot_points_to_new && facts.new_current_written && facts.queued_loc_written && !facts.replacement_old_removed, NonceDecision::Replace => facts.pending_slot_points_to_new && facts.new_current_written && facts.queued_loc_written && facts.replacement_old_removed, NonceDecision::TooLow | NonceDecision::Gap | NonceDecision::Conflict => false }
acceptance_criteria: submit transition is safe exactly when accept writes pending/current/queued without removing an old tx, replace writes pending/current/queued and removes the old tx, and low/gap/conflict remain unsafe

test_evidence.command: cargo test -p verified-core submit_transition_requires_nonce_acceptance_and_adapter_writes && cargo test -p ic-evm-core replacement_requires_higher_effective_fee
